summary: Tested Sprint prediction functionality for PRONOKIF. All backend API validations (12/12 tests passed) and frontend UI showing correct sprint steps order. Sprint weekends now correctly require 4 additional fields: sprint_quali_pole, sprint_quali_top10, sprint_race_winner, sprint_race_top10.

issues: Minor inconsistency: Admin page shows sprint steps in different order (after quali_pole/top10) than PredictionsPage (before quali_pole/top10). This is cosmetic and does not affect functionality.

backend_sprint_validation: GET /api/races/china-2026 - Returns is_sprint_weekend=true with sprint dates (200 OK)
GET /api/races/japan-2026 - Returns is_sprint_weekend=false, no sprint dates (200 OK)
POST /api/predictions - Sprint weekend rejects missing sprint_quali_pole (400)
POST /api/predictions - Sprint weekend rejects missing sprint_race_winner (400)
POST /api/predictions - Sprint weekend rejects missing sprint_quali_top10 (400)
POST /api/predictions - Sprint weekend rejects missing sprint_race_top10 (400)
POST /api/predictions - Classic weekend accepts predictions without sprint fields (200 OK)
POST /api/predictions - Classic weekend does not require sprint fields
POST /api/predictions - Sprint weekend accepts full prediction with all 8 fields (200 OK)
GET /api/predictions/race/{race_id} - Returns sprint fields in response
POST /api/predictions - Rejects quali_top10 with less than 10 drivers (400)
POST /api/predictions - Rejects race_top10 with less than 10 drivers (400)
frontend_predictions_page: Sprint Weekend badge visible for miami-2026
9 step buttons visible (4 sprint + 4 classic + 1 bonus)
Sprint steps appear BEFORE classic steps (correct order)
frontend_admin_page: Admin page loads with 3 tabs (Resultats, Notifications, Feedback)
Race selector shows sprint races with SPRINT badge
Sprint step buttons visible (POLE SQ, TOP10 SQ, WIN SR, TOP10 SR)

features_verified.sprint_weekend_detection: Working - API correctly identifies china-2026 as sprint, japan-2026 as classic
features_verified.sprint_prediction_validation: Working - All 4 sprint fields required for sprint weekends
features_verified.classic_prediction_validation: Working - Sprint fields not required for classic weekends
features_verified.sprint_fields_storage: Working - sprint_quali_pole, sprint_quali_top10, sprint_race_winner, sprint_race_top10 stored correctly
features_verified.predictions_page_sprint_ui: Working - 4 sprint steps shown BEFORE classic steps for sprint weekends
features_verified.admin_page_sprint_ui: Working - 4 sprint steps visible for sprint race results entry

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: AdminPage shows sprint steps after quali_pole/top10, while PredictionsPage shows sprint steps first. Consider aligning the order for consistency.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All sprint steps visible and correctly ordered

test_credentials.sprint_test_users: Created dynamically during tests (sprinttest_*, fulltest_*, admintest_*@test.com)

seed_data_creation: Test predictions created during API tests for miami-2026 and japan-2026
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint prediction feature fully tested. Backend validates 4 additional required fields for sprint weekends (sprint_quali_pole, sprint_quali_top10, sprint_race_winner, sprint_race_top10). Frontend PredictionsPage shows 9 steps for sprint weekends (4 sprint + 4 classic + bonus) with sprint steps appearing first. AdminPage also shows sprint steps for result entry. Classic weekends (like japan-2026) only require 4 fields (quali_pole, quali_top10, race_winner, race_top10). Use miami-2026 for sprint testing (upcoming), china-2026 has closed predictions.

sprint_requirements_verified.sprint_step_order_predictions_page: Sprint fields first, then main quali/race (as required)
